Task: Setup CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)
Description:
Setup full CI/CD pipeline GitHub Actions:

CI workflow (ci.yml):
• Trigger: PR/push
• Build Go backend + FE/admin
• Run unit test + lint (golangci-lint + eslint)
• Cache deps để speed up

CD staging (deploy-staging.yml):
• Trigger: merge vào branch develop (auto)
• Build Docker image + push registry
• SSH deploy server staging + health check

CD production (deploy-production.yml):
• Trigger: workflow_dispatch (manual)
• Build + push + SSH deploy
• Health check + rollback option
• Approval required
Notes: Gom CI + CD staging + CD production
